# UC-22.2.48 · NIS2 Art.20/21 governance — Board approval, management training and risk acceptance evidence

## Description

Correlates management-body roster, board approval records, cyber posture distribution, management training, overdue actions, and risk acceptance evidence.

## Value

Turns board oversight into inspectable evidence without claiming Splunk performs the approval itself.

## Implementation

Ingest LMS, GRC, and board action records; alert on overdue training, missing approvals, and stale risk acceptance.

## Detailed Implementation

Prerequisites
• Confirm this UC is in scope for the entity, sector, and national transposition being reviewed.
• Configure the listed feeds: index=grc sourcetype=grc:risk, index=lms sourcetype=lms:completion, lookup=nis2_management_body.csv, index=itsm sourcetype=snow:task.
• Retain results in a restricted evidence index with synchronised timestamps.

Step 1 — Configure data collection
Map source-system fields to owner, status, evidence_id, clause, affected_asset, affected_service, and last_success_time. Maintain related NIS2 lookups under change control.

Step 2 — Create the search and alert
Save the SPL as a disabled scheduled search, run it manually over 30 days, tune indexes and sourcetypes, and enable scheduling only after the control owner signs off.

Step 3 — Validate
Run the positive and negative fixture referenced in controlTest. Compare a sample of results to the source system of record for the same time range.

Step 4 — Operationalize
Route findings to the named owner, add the panel to the NIS2 posture dashboard, and archive result exports to index=audit_evidence or an equivalent tamper-evident store.

Step 5 — Troubleshooting
If results are empty, validate lookup contents and field extractions. If results are noisy, separate accepted exceptions into a time-bound exception lookup rather than suppressing the search.

## SPL

```spl
index=grc OR index=itsm OR index=audit_evidence earliest=-30d
| eval nis2_control="nis2_art_20_21_governance_board_approval"
| eval evidence_age_days=round((now()-coalesce(last_success_time,_time))/86400)
| eval evidence_gap=if(status IN ("overdue","failed","missing") OR evidence_age_days>30 OR isnull(owner),1,0)
| where evidence_gap=1
| table _time nis2_control owner status evidence_id evidence_age_days clause affected_asset affected_service
```

## Visualization

Board action table, training completion, risk acceptance aging.

## References

- [Directive (EU) 2022/2555 (NIS2)](https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/dir/2022/2555/oj)
- [Commission Implementing Regulation (EU) 2024/2690](https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg_impl/2024/2690/oj)
